description_long: This object is an elegant vanity table with a white, marble-like finish and gold decorative accents along the tabletop edges. The table features a three-panel folding mirror with a central arched section and two angled side mirrors, all framed in the same white material. The tabletop is rectangular with rounded corners and subtle carved details, supported by four turned legs with gold accent rings. There are two small drawers integrated into the front of the table, each with a decorative handle. The overall design is ornate and classical, suggesting a vintage or antique style. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with the mirrors providing reflective surfaces.
description: A vintage-style white vanity table with gold accents, three-panel folding mirror, and turned legs. Features ornate details and a smooth, marble-like finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the table, the thickness of the tabletop, and the profile of the three-panel mirror.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid white backing of the mirror panels and the decorative tabletop edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, showing the table's depth and mirror profile.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the three-panel mirror, ornate tabletop, two small drawers, and decorative handles.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest consists of a three-panel folding mirror with a central arched section and two angled side panels, all framed in white. The design is tall, segmented, and features a classic, elegant silhouette.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on this chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are turned and tapered, featuring carved details and gold accent rings near the top and bottom. They are finished in the same white color as the table, contributing to the ornate, vintage aesthetic.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery or fabric pattern; the surfaces are smooth and finished in a marble-like white with gold accents.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present on this object; the tabletop is a solid, flat surface.
